summary: B2B Lead Generation & Multilingual Translation Testing - All critical features PASS. Backend POST/GET /api/leads working. B2B forms on /partners, /travel-agencies, /hotels submit to backend and show success. Translation works on /become-driver, /become-client, /help, /looking-for-partners with correct language switching.

b2b_forms./partners: PASS - Form submits to backend, shows success message
b2b_forms./travel-agencies: PASS - Form submits to backend, shows success message
b2b_forms./hotels: PASS - Form submits to backend, shows success message

translation_pages./become-driver: PASS - H1 changes from 'Become a Driver' to 'Devenir Chauffeur' when switched to French
translation_pages./become-client: PASS - Page loads with H1 'How It Works', Title 'How It Works - Book Airport Transfer | Zont'
translation_pages./help: PASS - H1 'Help & Support', FAQ accordion works, FAQPage JSON-LD with 6 questions
translation_pages./looking-for-partners: PASS - H1 'Looking for Partners', Apply button navigates to /become-driver

frontend_tests.form_validation: PASS - Required fields (name, company, email) prevent form submission with 'Please fill out this field' message

/become-driver.title: Become a Driver - Join Zont | Professional Chauffeur

/become-client.title: How It Works - Book Airport Transfer | Zont

/looking-for-partners.title: Looking for Partners - Drive with Zont

critical_code_review_comments: B2BPage.js correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
POST /api/leads returns lead with id, name, company, email, status='new', timestamp
GET /api/leads returns list sorted by timestamp descending
Form validation uses HTML5 'required' attribute for name, company, email fields
Language context properly updates all translated content (H1, benefits, form labels)
seed_data_creation: Test leads created in MongoDB via pytest and Playwright

mocked_api.note: BecomeDriver and Help contact forms are still MOCKED (toast only, no backend). Only B2B forms (/partners, /travel-agencies, /hotels, etc.) connect to real backend.

context_for_next_testing_agent: B2B form-to-backend integration tested and working. All 4 translated pages (BecomeDriver, BecomeClient, Help, LookingForPartners) have correct EN/FR/RU content. Language switcher in header works. FAQPage JSON-LD on Help page verified with 6 questions. Form validation prevents empty submissions.
